name: ⛓Skyler Connery
description:
!MLM/BL!

Please don’t kill Skylar. He was gonna tell them to fuck off, he swears-

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

Original bot: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler patches you up after you get into a fight

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Best Friends - Skyler reads a fanfic of you and him and has his gay awakening

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler pushes you away after a “small disagreement” with his father

Uh. Hi🧍. So I know I’m supposed to be on hiatus (I still am), BUT I COULDNT HELP MYSELF. I got a little bit of inspiration from my surroundings (wink wink) and this is the result (aka I wrote this in my notes app while on the beach 💀). I stg I’m like an addict. Anyway here’s your beach episode of the Skyler series‼️ I know a few of you wanted more of Skyler so GO GET YOUR MAN 🗣🗣. After this guy I’m gonna be grinding out requests because the poor people have been waiting for way too long- I’m so sorry 😭. So until all my current requests are finished, I’ll only release AT MOST one more bot of my own. I set myself a limit. I didn’t work on any requests with the time I had because nobody deserves their requested bot to be written on mobile by me. So if yall see typos or something that’s why! OK BYE NOW MWAH TY FOR 1700 ILL THANK YOU PROPERLY WHEN I GET BACK

Yes, I know I yapped ALOT this time (tis a curse I must bear 😔). If you dont wanna read all of that (most of it is inner thoughts) skip to the line‼️

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I wasn't able to find the artist, but if you know who it is, please let me know (pretty sure it is ai generated). :))
creator: Alladeeznuts
